description_long: This is a polygonal, dark brown cup with a rugged, medieval-inspired design. The body of the cup is octagonal and features two wide, white, weathered bands encircling its exterior, each band marked with scratches and a prominent white 'X' motif on one side. The handle is angular and white, appearing roughly textured and slightly irregular, suggesting a hand-forged or rustic construction. The cup's surface is matte with visible wear, giving it a used, aged appearance. The interior is dark and deep, suitable for holding liquids, and the overall form is sturdy and functional. This cup would fit well in a fantasy tavern or rustic urban setting.
description: A rugged, octagonal dark brown cup with white weathered bands, a prominent 'X' motif, and a rough white handle. The surface is matte and aged, evoking a medieval or rustic style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white 'X' motif on the brown body, with the angular white handle visible on the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the cup and the full length of the white handle, with no 'X' motif visible.
description_view_2: Side view with the handle on the left and the 'X' motif partially visible on the right side of the cup.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cup's body with both white bands and no handle or 'X' motif in direct view.
